title: DigestResponse
description: Structured competitive intelligence digest returned by the Agent Orchestrator.

digest_type.description: Classified intent type for this digest.

query.description: The original user prompt that generated this digest.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this digest was generated.

report_id.description: Unique identifier for this report, used to look up traceability data.

executive_summary.description: 2-3 sentence overview of the most important findings. If no articles found, this will state so explicitly.

key_signals.description: Ranked list of notable events or signals detected from source articles.

risks.description: Identified competitive threats or risks with severity ratings.

opportunities.description: Identified strategic openings or opportunities with confidence levels.

action_items.description: Prioritized recommended actions for the ops team.

sources.description: All source articles referenced in this digest. Every URL in key_signals, risks, and opportunities MUST appear here.

tool_trace.description: Ordered list of MCP tool calls made to generate this digest, for audit and debugging.

signal.description: Description of what happened and why it matters.

source_url.description: URL of the source article supporting this signal.

published_date.description: Publication date of the source article in ISO 8601 format.

description.description: Description of the competitive threat or risk.

source_urls.description: URLs of source articles that support this risk assessment. Must be non-empty.

confidence.description: Confidence level in this opportunity assessment.

source_urls.description: URLs of source articles that support this opportunity assessment. Must be non-empty.

action.description: Recommended action for the ops team.

priority.description: P0 = act now (today), P1 = this week, P2 = track and monitor.

rationale.description: Explanation of why this action is recommended.

published_date.description: Publication date of the source article in ISO 8601 format.

snippet.description: Short excerpt from the source article.

tool_name.description: Name of the MCP tool called.

input.description: Input parameters passed to the tool.

output_summary.description: Human-readable summary of what the tool returned (not the full raw output).

latency_ms.description: Time taken for this tool call in milliseconds.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this tool call was made.
